title: Longevity GlyNAC Powder™
tagline: Glutathione precursor complex for mitochondrial and longevity support
purpose: A high-potency powder formulation delivering the GlyNAC combination (Glycine and N-Acetylcysteine) alongside complementary longevity-associated micronutrients. Informed by emerging geroscience research and classical Islamic medical concepts of vital force replenishment.
supports: Endogenous glutathione biosynthesis as a primary cellular antioxidant

dosing.note: Dissolved in 8 oz. cold water, on an empty stomach or with a light meal

safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any health condition.
NAC may interact with nitroglycerin and certain chemotherapeutic agents; consult your clinician.
Individuals with cystinuria should not use NAC-containing formulations without medical supervision.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults with a specific interest in longevity-associated nutritional support
Individuals seeking to support endogenous glutathione levels through precursor nutrition
Those working with a practitioner on a comprehensive mitochondrial support protocol
systemRole: This Module formulation addresses the longevity and mitochondrial resilience dimension of the HTP System. It is designed to complement the Cellular Resilience Complex™ Core and is best used under practitioner guidance.
